DESKTOP.arrangement: Desktop web uses a two column main container with header, field group, action group, and overlay host.
DESKTOP.width_behavior: Minimum width 1024px; content wraps inside readable columns and horizontal scroll is not used for primary fields or actions.
DESKTOP.height_scroll_behavior: Required information may exceed viewport height only through vertical page scroll.
DESKTOP.navigation_placement: Page identity and primary actions remain in header and action region without adding navigation.
DESKTOP.safe_area_or_system_bars: Browser chrome is respected; no content depends on unsafe viewport edges.
DESKTOP.input_keyboard_behavior: Desktop input focus keeps Save draft, Validate brief, and Generate DRD reachable by scroll.

TABLET.arrangement: Tablet reflows to a single readable column with preserved section order.
TABLET.width_behavior: Width 768-1023px stacks secondary content below primary fields and wraps long copy.
TABLET.height_scroll_behavior: Required information may exceed viewport height only through vertical scroll.
TABLET.navigation_placement: Actions remain after the field group with optional sticky placement when height is limited.
TABLET.safe_area_or_system_bars: Tablet browser or app chrome is respected with internal padding.
TABLET.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard does not hide the focused field or recovery controls; vertical scroll recovers obscured content.

MOBILE.arrangement: Mobile stacks header, field group, action group, state messages, and overlay in one column.
MOBILE.width_behavior: Mobile width wraps labels and actions; no primary field, action, review copy, navigation, or overlay control requires horizontal scroll.
MOBILE.height_scroll_behavior: Required information may exceed viewport height only through vertical scroll or anchored actions.
MOBILE.navigation_placement: Primary actions can anchor near the bottom but remain part of the same page task.
MOBILE.safe_area_or_system_bars: Generic mobile safe areas and system bars are respected.
MOBILE.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard inset moves focused fields and does not cover Generate DRD or recovery actions permanently.

MOBILE_IOS.arrangement: iOS mobile uses the mobile stack with iOS-style select and text controls.
MOBILE_IOS.width_behavior: Minimum width 375px; content wraps inside safe area with no horizontal scroll for primary task content.
MOBILE_IOS.height_scroll_behavior: Short height uses vertical scroll and anchored actions without hiding fields or recovery copy.
MOBILE_IOS.navigation_placement: iOS navigation stack expectations are respected without creating a second page.
MOBILE_IOS.safe_area_or_system_bars: Safe area insets, home indicator, and status bar are respected.
MOBILE_IOS.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard avoidance keeps focused input, validation controls, and overlay recovery actions reachable.

MOBILE_MATERIAL.arrangement: Material mobile uses the mobile stack with Material text fields, select, action grouping, and dialog overlay behavior.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.width_behavior: Minimum width 360px; fields and actions wrap inside the Material content column with no horizontal scroll.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.height_scroll_behavior: Short height uses vertical scroll or anchored actions; required copy remains available.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.navigation_placement: Material app bar and action placement expectations are respected without adding navigation scope.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.safe_area_or_system_bars: System bars and edge-to-edge insets are respected.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard inset and IME behavior keep inputs and overlay recovery actions reachable.
platform_constraints: snackbar versus dialog distinction when applicable
